PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED DEC-14-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CONCEPCION, NONY V
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION, NONY V RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE $4,697.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,772.00, HYDEN AUTO CARE SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION $4697 FOR THE VALUE OF HIS 2012 DODGE CARAVAN. HAYDEN FAILED TO OBTAIN AUTHORIZATION TO FURTHER EXAMINE THE VAN FOR ENGINE REPLACEMENT ESTIMATE. PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION MUST REMOVE THE 2012 DODGE FROM HAYDEN AUTO CARE PREMISES BY END OF BUSINESS FEBRUARY 26, 2021. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2021 - JUDGMENT.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-15-2021 - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE RESPONDENT NONY CONCEPCION. ALL EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. THE CASE IS REMANDED BACK TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: R. GUMPAL, NOT REPORTED, (505).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CONCEPCION, NONY V RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE $3,730.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,805.00, PLS. SEE ATTACHED WRITTEN COURT JUDGMENT (2 PAGES). THERE IS NO CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CONCEPCION, NONY V PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION OWES 0.00 AMOUNT TO DEFENDANT HAYDEN FOR THE STORAGE FEES OR COSTS OF REPAIR OR LABOR ASSOCIATED WITH THE 2012 DODGE CARAVAN. SEE ABOVE - PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION MUST REMOVE THE 2012 DODGE CARAVAN FROM HAYDEN AUTO CARE PREMISES BY THE END OF BUSINESS FEBRUARY 26, 2021 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE MAILED TO RESPONDENT CONCEPCION, NONY V
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-15-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 505
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY CHRIS RIVERA REPRESENTING DEFENDANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE FILED BY DEFENDANT HAYDEN AUTO CARE AS TO PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION, NONY V

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Nony V. Concepcion, Defendant, Cross Complainant, Appellant (415) 999-4993
Alexander J. Petale, Esq. for Hayden Auto Care Defendant, Cross Complainant, Appellant with witness Marlon Pastor. (323) 240-3894

This cause comes on regularly or trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn by the clerk.

Mr. Petale presents opening statements on behalf of Hayden Auto Care Defendant, Cross Complainant, Appellant.

Mr. Concepcion, Defendant, Cross Complainant, Appellant presents opening statements and testifies on his behalf.

Witness Marlon Pastor testifies on behalf of Hayden Auto Care Defendant, Cross Complainant, Appellant. Mr. Petale conducts cross-examination on the witness.

The Court asks both parties to submit any documents or exhibits they would like him to review. The Court collects all new exhibits. The clerk informs the parties that they may pick up the exhibits once the judgment is entered. No exhibits were marked.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).
